calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Motion To Consolidate Arbitration With Civil Action For All Purposes
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert F. Kane of the Law Offices of Robert F. Kane, 982-1510, appearing for petitioner and opposing party
Arnold Berschler of Berschler & Associates, 398-1414, appearing for respondent and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Respondent GERARD COLLIER'S Amended Motion To Consolidate Arbitration With Civil Action For All Purposes is denied. The pending Court action was not filed prior to the hearing on the petition to compel arbitration that this motion addresses (CCP 1281.2 (c)). Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Amended Notice Of Motion To Consolidate Arbitration With Civil Action For All Purposes

NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Nov-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert F. Kane, Esq. of ROCKWELL & KANE 982-1510, for petitioners Anne and Sam Kim, moving TO CONFIRM ARBITATION AWARD
Arnold I. Berschler, Esq. of BERSCHLER & ASSOCIATES 800-338-1441, for respondent and opposing party Gerald Collier
Jack Chew appearing in propria persona (no phone number), opposing the motion

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court made the following rulings on PETITIONERs ANNE KIM and SAM KIM'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITATION AWARD -- The Court confirmed the awards as to defendants Jack Chew and Richard Fairchild. Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare an order and comply with CRC 391. The Court further ordered the hearing continued. Counsel to agree on briefing and hearing schedules. Counsel for Collier is to prepare a proposed order. (301/JLW/JT-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
